title: Jun's Pikcraft
description:
Major Pikmin themed Resource Pack.
(FABRIC ONLY)
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HbeeKKgJSBY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/IdyJvVG5Pgs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

INTRODUCING MY PIKMIN RESOURCE PACK!
A huge pack made with creatures and characters from EVERY PIKMIN GAME, any pikmin fan will recognize each one in in this pack! (with the exception of artistic liberties taken, introducing a few small new ones

**(PLEASE CREDIT ME IF USED FOR A MODPACK OR OTHER RELATED PROJECT!!!
DO NOT REUPLOAD THIS ON OTHER SITES WITHOUT PERMISSION)**

- WOLF TEXTURES WILL BREAK WHEN THE VARIANTS RELEASE, STAND BY FOR WHEN THIS GETS UPDATED

This pack features:
- Several custom mob models + Sound
-  Sounds for other various action such as Footsteps, GUI...
 - Custom items and blocks
 - Several variations for mobs that you can collect! 
 - Loving details/secrets and references 
 - Custom subtitles and mob names
 - GUI made to look like the Pikmin games
 - Custom Music Discs-
 -Plenty of plants
 - And more!

QUITE A FEW CREATURES HAVE VARIANTS! 
For example...- Golden Hocotate Ship camel variant
- Moss Cat variant- 
- Man-At-Legs horse variant

**CREATURES WITH BIOME VARIANTS CAN BE NAME-TAGGED TO STAY THAT WAY!NAME THEM EXACTLY AS SHOWN BELOW WITH NAMETAGS, INCLUDING THE DASHES- **
- Snagret
- Pileated-Snagret
 - Fiery-Blowhog
- Watery-Blowhog
- Snowy-Blowhog

_ALSO FEATURING A BONUS CONTENT FOLDER WITH SKINS MADE BY ME! 
Along with a couple development screenshots!_

**CREDITS**

Sounds/Music/IP: Nintendo

Textures/Sprites/Models: JuniperPinPan

Pikmin 4/Hey pikmin sound help: KingoKings365/Jbuilder1234

Pikmin 2/3 rips : olimar12345

Whistle/Horn rips : WafflesMoguMoguCustom 

XP bar text shader files : https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/custom-xp-colours-generator-site/

**QNA**

_Why isn't optifine listed/supported anymore?_

- The way it was would bug things out regarding some mob randomization (ironically the most important mob, Pikmin) and i decided since fabric can allow much better performance, I leaned towards that instead. Sorry!

_Why do some mobs have no custom sound?_

- I am unable to access some sounds regarding creatures from hey pikmin, or ones i literally have nothing to work off of such as the zoglin. Sorry!

_The models are broken!_

- Make sure custom entitys are enabled in the optifine options. This also goes for other features such as custom colors.

_Will you add more?_

- Most likely! Not too often as I have things in life to do other than this, but I will definitely add and improve things as times go on!

_Some mobs have missing textures! (this is regarding old worlds not made with the pack)_

- The optimize world button should fix it!
